CustomField.description: If Billing Call or Webinar Status is Complete, shows the number of days from the Billing Call or Webinar Date to the Billing Setup Threshold Met Stamp date. (Billing_Setup_Threshold_Met_Stamp__c - Billing_Call_or_Webinar_Date__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If Billing Call or Webinar Status is Complete, shows the number of days from the Billing Call or Webinar Date to the Billing Setup Threshold Met Stamp date.
CustomField.label: Days Billing Call 1 to Setup Stamp
